creator: thomas@goodking.ca
text:
Please provide a copy of the errorlog that was generated, and the output of 
ls -l /var/db/pkg directly to me, thomas@goodking.ca.

I have not yet attempted to duplicate the problem, but I suspect it is more 
a function of mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin, as it requires 
security/libgpg-error as a dependancy via security/gunpg.

Thomas
